mapper.insert:
insert into entry_info (id,pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, total, data,serial) values
(#{item.id},#{item.pid}, #{item.goods}, #{item.attr}, #{item.unit}, #{item.warehouse}, #{item.batch}, #{item.mfd}, #{item.price}, #{item.nums}, #{item.total}, #{item.data},'[]')
mapper.select:
select id,pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, total, data from entry_info where id in
#{item}

select id,pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, total, data from entry_info where id in
#{item}

select id,pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, total, data from entry_info where pid in
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO entry_info (pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, total, data, serial) VALUES (#{pid}, #{goods}, #{attr}, #{unit}, #{warehouse}, #{batch}, #{mfd}, #{price}, #{nums}, #{total}, #{data}, '1')
